label: Stat part (biostat total base)
description: Abstract intermediate schema for StatPart subclasses that scale the stat by a total biostat score evaluated against a curve. Not directly instantiable - use StatPart_MetabolismTotal.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping the biostat total to the stat factor. Inherited from StatPart_Curve.
